user.title: Yale Parcel Box / Door Lock
user.description: Adds activity monitoring, PIN management, and access mode to your Yale lock. Uses the OAuth token from your existing Yale integration. Works for a parcel box (courier deliveries) or a regular door (Airbnb / home guest access).

select_lock.title: Select Lock
select_lock.description: Choose the house and lock, and how it is used.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Yale lock
reconfigure.description: Change how this lock is used — a parcel box or a regular door. The lock and its codes stay the same.

error.no_core: Yale integration not found. Set up the core Yale integration first.
error.no_houses: No houses found on your Yale account.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Yale API. Try again later.
